fields.description: If enabled, field Academic Term will be Mandatory in Program Enrollment Tool.
fields.label: Make Academic Term Mandatory
Instructor Records to be created by
fields.options:
Full Name
Naming Series
Employee Number

fields.description: By default, the Sales Invoice Created will be in Draft Mode. If enabled, the Sales Invoice will be submitted once created.
fields.label: Submit Sales Invoice from Enrollments

fields.description: This will only consider what the student should pay, not other payers.
fields.label: Minimum percentage paid for enrollment

fields.description: Once you allow audits, you will need to create a Fee Category, Item, and Payer Fee Category PE to match this (in the later, select the Is Audit checkbox
fields.label: Allow audits?

fields.description: If not checked, the corresponding fee will be the same for all audited courses.
fields.label: Should audit be charged per credit hour?

fields.description: In this version, all students will advance, regardless of their performance. However, a manual submission will be required when these validations will occur.
fields.label: Auto-advance students in Time-based Programs?

fields.description: This customer will be used in all Sales Invoices of Scholarships.
fields.label: Scholarship - Customer

fields.description: Provide a small (100x100px), round image (or with enough blank space) to be used in the Student Portal. This is for the light theme,
fields.label: Seminary Logo (light theme)

fields.description: The app has a default instruction on how students and staff can import calendars to Google, Apple, Microsoft and Others. Any text here will completely override that description.
fields.label: Course Calendar Instructions
Show Student Application button on login

fields.description: This is the system user for portal support for students.
fields.label: Support User

fields.description: When checked, students will see the withdrawal dates for the course (defined per academic term) and have a button to request course withdrawal.
fields.label: Allow students to request course withdrawal on Portal

fields.description: Setting dates per term allows the system to automatically apply withdrawal rules, that can be overridden manually
fields.label: Set Withdrawal dates per Academic Term

fields.description: This setting will determine what needs to occur when there is a payment from the Scholarship Customer; all the specifics are handled by Withdrawal Rules
fields.label: Default Scholarship Procedure on Withdrawals
fields.options:
Refund to Scholarship Fund
Refund to Scholarship Fund and Create Invoice for Student

fields.description: When checked, students will have access to Enrollment page listing only courses available for their program, which they have not yet taken. They will be able to cancel the enrollment before it is submitted.
fields.label: Allow students to request course enrollment on Portal

fields.description: Provide a small (100x100px), round image (or with enough blank space) to be used in the Student Portal. This is for the dark theme,
fields.label: Seminary logo (dark theme)

fields.description: This requires the installation of another app "Payments" by Frappe. Payments makes the bridge between this and the Payment Gateways.
fields.label: Enable Online Payments
